The Ouratea plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Ouratea thorelii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the Ouratea plant is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems.
